message:
fix(test): add context_window_tokens field to const compaction test settings

Update make_settings() in tests/compaction.rs to include the new
context_window_tokens field (200_000) added to ResolvedCompactionSettings,
replacing the implicit ..Default::default() with an explicit value since
the function is const and cannot use Default::default().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
